text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hah... Whether I like it or not, I know it's my pride
to blame.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I thought I had gotten stronger, but in truth... I'm
still weak.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I need to come to grips with the fact.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
There's no one more foolish than an arrogant
person who doesn't know their own weakness.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
choice_data_list: It was still a great race, Brian.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Cut it out. I get it already.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
The other racers at the Kikuka Sho today were
just stronger than me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: But, I'm not just going to let that slide forever.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
The Classic Triple Crown is over, and I let the title
of the strongest racer slip away...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... Help me take out every speck of
weakness we found today.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Rip those weaknesses out and use them as fuel to
shape me into a runner capable of the victory I've
been dreaming of.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Right now, the others are all getting stronger...
No doubt Amazon is too!
choice_data_list: I'll give it everything I've got!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I know I can get stronger if you'll stick with me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Narita Brian's Classic Triple Crown tour
comes to an end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her next goal is the Arima Kinen at the end of the
year, where Hishi Amazon and the senior racers
await!
